title: Death Note YTP Co-op: A Friendly Game of Tennis
description:
Like and suscribe!
Hurricoaster: https://www.youtube.com/c/Hurricoaster
Ultracslewisjr: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCoL19HQvGR6A5spW8r3DX-Q

My solo work: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8gp8wbbvtJc
UltraCS's solo work: https://youtu.be/0ANRyqUVDsQ

This is a collaborative effort between myself and Ultracslewisjr. This project originally began when I suggested to Ultracslewisjr that I wanted to create an anime YTP. We decided to edit Death Note Episode 10, "Doubt." Up until this point, I had never watched Death Note. While editing I felt it necessary to watch the entire series and was not disappointed. 

Ultracslewisjr and I initially decided to keep our edits secret from one another, with the intent of later moshing together the best parts. Ultimately we decided to trade scenes. As you can see, the tennis scene is a blend of our styles. We began the project early in the Fall semester of 2015, and got around to finishing it today. We hope you enjoy!

Software used: Vegas Pro 12.0, Vegas Pro 9.0, Paint.NET
